headline: Pata Kurullo – Hiru TV wins Most Popular Teledrama of the Year

content.text: Pata Kurullo – Hiru TV and the award record

Pata Kurullo – Hiru TV is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Most Popular Teledrama of the Year. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Pata Kurullo – Hiru TV, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

IMDb lists Paata Kurullo, also presented as Colourful Birds, as a TV series. The GBE archive records Pata Kurullo - Hiru TV as Most Popular Teledrama of the Year. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
